name: statickg

metadata.name: statickg
metadata.summary: Tools for creating & running knowledge graphs from files

documentation:
# Overview

Tools for creating and managing knowledge graph from files

methods.name: statickg.models.repository.GitRepository.fetch
documentation: Fetch new data. Return True if there is new data

methods.name: statickg.main.ETLPipelineRunner.prepare_work_dir
documentation: Prepare the working directory for the ETL process

classes.name: statickg.models.etl.ETLConfig
documentation: Configuration to run a pipeline

class_variables.name: statickg.models.file_and_path.RefPathRef.end
documentation: exclusive

classes.name: statickg.models.file_and_path.RelPathRefStr
documentation: String that contains references to relative paths

classes.name: statickg.services.drepr_upd.DReprService
documentation:
D-REPR Service that is used to extract data from a file

Args:
    name: name of the service
    workdir: working directory
    args: arguments to the service
    services: a dictionary of services

functions.name: statickg.helper.import_func
documentation: Import function from string, e.g., sm.misc.funcs.import_func

functions.name: statickg.helper.get_latest_version
documentation:
Assuming the file pattern select list of files tagged with an integer version for every run, this
function return the latest version number that you can use to name your next run.

For example:
1. If your pattern matches folders: version_1, version_5, version_6, this function will return 6.
2. If your pattern does not match anything, return 0

functions.name: statickg.helper.wait_till_port_available
documentation: Wait for the port to be available. Return true if the port is available within the timeout. Otherwise false

class_variables.name: statickg.services.version.VersionServiceInvokeArgs.entity
documentation: uri of the entity

class_variables.name: statickg.services.version.VersionServiceInvokeArgs.entity_type
documentation: type of the entity

classes.name: statickg.services.version.VersionService

methods.name: statickg.services.version.VersionService.forward
documentation: Generate version of knowledge graph
A service that can generate version of knowledge graph

classes.name: statickg.services.split.HashSplitService
documentation:
A service that split records of a file based on the hash of a record's field.

Args:
    name: name of the service
    workdir: working directory
    args: arguments to the service
    services: a dictionary of services

methods.name: statickg.services.split.SplitFn.split_file
documentation:
Split a file into multiple buckets based on the hash of a record's field.

This function returns the list of output files' relative paths.

methods.name: statickg.services.fuseki.DBInfo.has_running_service
documentation: Check if the directory has a running Fuseki service

methods.name: statickg.services.fuseki.DBInfo.next
documentation: Get next directory for the database

methods.name: statickg.services.fuseki.DBInfo.get_older_versions
documentation: Get older versions of the database

classes.name: statickg.services.fuseki.FusekiDataLoaderService
documentation: A service that can ensure that the Fuseki service is running with the latest data.

params.name:
typer.Argument(
            help="A path to a file containing the configuration of the pipeline",
            exists=True,
            dir_okay=False,
        )
typer.Argument(help="A directory for storing intermediate ETL results")
typer.Argument(help="A directory containing the data Git repository")

typer.Option(
            "--overwrite-config/--no-overwrite-config",
            help="Overwrite the configuration file if it exists",
        )

D-REPR Service that is used to extract data from a file

Args:

    workdir: working directory
    args: arguments to the service
